source: omeda.city ranked match feed (official Omeda public API): same-role lane pairs, 2026-06-30 -> 2026-07-07; directed "a|b" = a's record into b, n >= 20
note: EMPIRICAL head-to-head lane records computed from the open feed — no rank filter (all ranks). Raw `cells` persist ALL pairs so reruns resume incrementally from window.to; `pairs` is the n-gated consumable.

validation.method: sim net kill-window verdict vs field winrate, counted only where both commit (field >=52% or <=48%, sim net != 0)
